content:
看了，上游mpv特征表没跑出来，连续失败4天了，我重点了下还是报错僵尸任务，需要xiongfu看下啥问题，只是今天的分还没跑出来，线上没啥影响，策略的接口还没开发好
还有一个想法就是，我想这些job经常失败大家有时候没看就一直失败，长期来说最好是自动化运维，流程就是任务报错 -> 通知lark机器人 -> agent读取airflow log debug (目前这一步我先打算本地跑agent， 长期是云端跑，这个需要公司的一些基建）->  需要人review或者执行一些任务的话有一个类似审批的机制，lark机器人这个我之前那个试了下是可以发布的，另外可以用lark cli 实现好多任务，我还在弄这个，你感兴趣的话我们可以讨论下

content:
hi @Alexander Indrajaya L team,
is there a way to inject custom secrets into the airflow dag? e.g. a Lark webhook url? since such info can't be committed into the repo.

E.g. can we update the ci/cd build script in mlops-cicd  to inject these as environment variables via gitlab ci/cd variables? Or any other better way of doing this?

cc @Dong Yajie

payload.content:

content:
@all  As mentioned in our sprint last week: Please take note of the following changes to the MC quota (from MAB -> DAB). DE has confirmed the new timeline for MAB to be 13/14th April (today and tmr), and we're expecting the MAB execution quota to be scaled down to 0 on 16th April afternoon.

[https://applink.larksuite.com/client/message/link/open?token=Ame%2FzMuPQcAgadRp7%2BBBjt0%3D](https://applink.larksuite.com/client/message/link/open?token=Ame%2FzMuPQcAgadRp7%2BBBjt0%3D)

Transition for MAB environments (13th/14th April). Will need everyone's help to execute these changes tmr for MAB Airflow pipelines and your personal Jupyter. Please check the assigned pipelines (based on active pipelines only) here: [https://gotocompany.sg.larksuite.com/sheets/QqtksBe81hzFSKtlPkdldeRag8g](https://gotocompany.sg.larksuite.com/sheets/QqtksBe81hzFSKtlPkdldeRag8g)

1. instancecreator permissions in the new DAB execution projects have been assigned and transferred to our LendingDS Ram role and BOTs. (No action needed by you)
2. Update your dslib in Jupyter to 3.5.1 (reminder on how to upgrade: [https://gotocompany.sg.larksuite.com/docx/JaizdCQY8oTcfux3WJnl0aS7gGf](https://gotocompany.sg.larksuite.com/docx/JaizdCQY8oTcfux3WJnl0aS7gGf))
3. Update your dslib image in Airflow pipelines to 3.5.1 in job_config.yaml, e.g.
[Image: img_v3_0210i_123b591d-db95-4ded-a555-ba3db90a30hu]
  - Follow your assigned pipelines. @Deng Xiongfu @Zhao Yuanlong @Priadi Teguh Wibowo @Chen Chao @Dong Yajie @Sun Yidong 
  - If I assigned wrongly, just change the name on the sheet accordingly.
  - Please mark to completed once done. The objective is to finish this by tomorrow (14th April).
4. If you have any python dslib code that manually specifies the client_project_id anywhere (in Airflow pipelines/Jupyter notebooks/...), e.g. mcquery2df(query, client_project_id="p_mab_id_data_access") , you should also remove / change it to the new execution projects: p_gopay_id_mab_data_access
5. Continue to watch out for pipeline failures in the Lark alert group.

For MGR: Don't upgrade to dslib 3.5.1 yet (either Jupyter or Airflow). I will update here again once we get the cue from DE team.
For MFC: No change needed.
